title: Ondra Renda Aasaigal Lyrics Kaakha Kaakha
stanzas:
pengalai nirmidhidaa
un iniya ganniyam pudikkudhe.
kangalai neraai paarthuthaan
nee pesum thoranai pudikkudhe.

thoorathil nee vandhaale
en manasil mazhi adikkum.
miga piditha paadal ondrai
udhadugalum munu munukkum.

mandhagaasam sindhum
undhan mugam
maranam varaiyil
en nenjil thangum.

sandhiya kaala megangal
un vaanil oorvalam pogudhe.
paarkayil yeno nenjile
un nadaiyin saarale thondruthe.

nadhigalile neeraadum
sooriyanai naan kanden.
vervaigalin thuli valiya
nee varuvaai ena nindren.

unnal en nenjil aanai manam
naan un sondham endra
ennam tharum.

anbe iravai ketkalaam
iravai ketkalaam
vidiyal thaandiyum
irave neelumaa
irave neelumaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ondra Renda Aasaigal'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Kaakha Kaakha'?

In Kaakha Kaakha, the song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional connection.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Bombay Jayashree and composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'Ondra Renda Aasaigal' released?

The song was released in 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ondra Renda Aasaigal, the emotional landscape of love is beautifully portrayed through heartfelt lyrics and a soothing melody. The song serves as a backdrop to pivotal romantic moments in Kaakha Kaakha, enhancing the narrative of love and longing. With its melancholic yet romantic vibe, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and deep emotional connection. The collaboration between Bombay Jayashree's voice and Harrish Jeyaraj's composition creates a timeless piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ondra Renda Aasaigal from Kaakha Kaakha is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Bombay Jayashree's enchanting vocals and Harrish Jeyaraj's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional depth and lyrical beauty that make this track a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: Is it enough to just say all the desires?
My love, can we hear the night? Is the night blue after the dawn?
In my dreams... I saw... that day was the end of the story.
With worries... we can talk about many stories... that was the end of the story.
Is it enough to just say all the desires?
My love, can we hear the night? Is the night blue after the dawn?
To create girls, your sweet nature is liked. You have seen the way I speak.
If you come from afar, it will echo in my heart. A very beloved song will help me.
The gentle breeze sings until your face is in my heart.
In your eyes, I see my dreams.
Is it enough to just say all the desires?
My love, can we hear the night? Is the night blue after the dawn?
At dusk, clouds are moving in your sky. In the view, something in my heart reflects your walk.
I saw the sun shining in the rivers. I am waiting for you to come like the dust.
With you, my heart will give me the feeling of belonging.
Happiness is overflowing, the sky is starting to shine.
My love, can we hear the night? Can we hear the night? Is the night blue after the dawn?
In my dreams... I saw... that day was the end of the story.
With worries... we can talk about many stories... that was the end of the story.
